key_insight: PolicyGuard turns organizational policy text into an executable neuro-symbolic compliance engine, making document review explicit instead of relying on opaque end-to-end prompting.
engineering_relevance: It offers a maintainable way to audit and update compliance workflows for contract review, especially where policy logic must be inspectable and testable.
method: Convert policy guidance into typed relational logic rules plus atom-level extraction questions.
Use LLMs to answer local questions from retrieved document evidence.
Apply a symbolic evaluator to the extracted facts to flag non-compliance.
evidence_signal: The paper instantiates and evaluates PolicyGuard on company-specific NDA compliance review, where contract clauses are checked against organization-specific negotiation policies.
watch_item: Performance depends on high-quality policy formalization, retrieval, and question design; errors in any of these stages can propagate into the final compliance decision.
paper_title: PolicyGuard: From Organizational Policies to Neuro-SymbolicCompliance Review Engines
